Description: Public boat launch and marina facility on Shelby Lakes in Gulf State Park. Two-lane boat ramp with courtesy dock overnight boat storage trailer parking and fish cleaning station. Access to Little Lagoon and Gulf of Mexico.
Tags: boat launch|fishing|marina|trailer parking|fish cleaning station|kayak launch|public access

ItemID: Single boat launch fee valid for one day. Includes use of courtesy dock and fish cleaning station.
Launch fee for kayaks canoes and paddleboards. Includes access to designated launch area.
Daily trailer and vehicle parking while on water. Secure lot with attendant.
Secure overnight boat storage on trailer in designated area.
30-day boat storage on trailer in secure lot. Must register boat with park office.
Unlimited boat launches for one year from purchase date. Registered to boat and owner. Non-transferable.
Unlimited access to all Alabama State Parks including boat launches picnic areas and beaches.

EventID: All boats must have valid Alabama registration. Personal watercraft and boats must follow all safety regulations. Life jackets required.
Alabama fishing license required for all anglers age 16+. Available for purchase at park office and local retailers.
Launch facility open dawn to dusk daily. Overnight storage boats must be registered at park office. Night fishing allowed from courtesy dock.
Two-lane concrete ramp with courtesy dock. Fish cleaning station with running water. Restrooms available. Ample trailer parking. No fuel sales on-site.
Cash credit and debit cards accepted. Annual passes available at park office. Self-service payment kiosk available during off-hours.
No glass containers on dock or ramp. Clean up after fish cleaning. Dispose of trash properly. No littering. Speed limit 5 mph in no-wake zone.
